articles.title_en: Dodik: Europeans are definitely trying to make the EU a military union

articles.title_en: Andrei Pinchuk, first security minister of Russia’s separatist ‘republic’ in Donetsk, survives package bomb at his home outside Moscow
articles.lead_en: A courier delivered a package to the home of Andrei Pinchuk in New Moscow, triggering an explosion, the Russian state news agency TASS said, citing law enforcement. Pinchuk served as security minister of the self-proclaimed Donetsk People’s Republic (“DNR”) from 2014 to 2015.

articles.title_en: Putin: the Russian Federation has tried to simplify the supply of equipment to the troops
articles.lead_en: The Russian President emphasized that he tried to do this, and the Russian Ministry of Defense took up this, so that “nothing is squeezed”, so that there is no “excessive over-administration”
articles.title_raw: Путин: в РФ постарались упростить поставку оборудования в войска

articles.title_en: Volunteer Zinoviev from Zaporozhye region: when the Russian Federation came, we returned to our home
articles.lead_en: Vitaly Zinoviev with the call sign Maza was one of the first to join the Zaporozhye battalion named after Pavel Sudoplatov (today the 32nd detachment of the BARS named after Pavel Sudoplatov), ​​and after demobilization he became the social coordinator of the branch of the Defenders of the Fatherland foundation in the Zaporozhye region. In an interview with TASS, he recalled repelling Ukrainian attacks in his native region at the beginning of a special military operation (SVO), spoke about the attitude of residents towards Russia, and explained why he believes that Zaporozhye is a Russian city
articles.title_raw: Доброволец Зиновьев из Запорожской области: когда РФ зашла, мы вернулись в свой дом
articles.lead_raw: Виталий Зиновьев с позывным Маза одним из первых вступил в запорожский батальон имени Павла Судоплатова (сегодня — 32-й отряд БАРС имени Павла Судоплатова), а после демобилизации стал социальным координатором филиала фонда "Защитники Отечества" в Запорожской области. В интервью ТАСС он вспомнил об отражении украинских атак в родном регионе в начале специальной военной операции (СВО), рассказал об отношении жителей к России, объяснил, почему считает, что Запорожье — русский город

articles.title_en: Putin: attack aircraft have always put an end to any battle, and this is the case today
